mapper.select: /* taxMgmtMapper.getTaxSmsSendListDt */ SELECT A.TAX_NO , A.CONTRACT_NUM /* 받는 사람 예약번호 */ , SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(A.USER_SSN) ,1,6)||' - '|| SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(A.USER_SSN) ,7 ,7) AS SSN /* 주민번호 */ , A.TAX_ADR_ZIP AS ZIP /* 우편번호 */ , DECODE(TAX_ADR_ZIP,'','','('||A.TAX_ADR_ZIP||')'||A.TAX_ADR_PRIMARY_LN||' '||A.TAX_ADR_SECONDARY_LN) AS ADDR /* 주소 */ , A.TEL_NO AS TEL_NO /*수신번호*/ , A.USER_NM AS CUST_NAME /*고객명*/ , TO_CHAR(A.TAX_RECV_TIME,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS RECV_TIME /*회신일자*/ , A.AGENT_TEL_NUM AS AGENT_TEL_NUM /*법정대리인 연락처*/ FROM MSP_TAX_SMS_SEND_LIST A WHERE TAX_NO = #{taxNo} ORDER BY CONTRACT_NUM DESC

/* taxMgmtMapper.getTaxSmsSendListByExcel */ SELECT A.TAX_NO , A.CONTRACT_NUM /* 받는 사람 예약번호 */ , SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(A.USER_SSN) ,1,6)||' - '|| SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(A.USER_SSN) ,7 ,7) AS SSN /* 주민번호 */ , A.TAX_ADR_ZIP AS ZIP /* 우편번호 */ , DECODE(TAX_ADR_ZIP,'','','('||A.TAX_ADR_ZIP||')'||A.TAX_ADR_PRIMARY_LN||' '||A.TAX_ADR_SECONDARY_LN) AS ADDR /* 주소 */ , A.TEL_NO AS TEL_NO /*수신번호*/ , A.USER_NM AS CUST_NAME /*고객명*/ , TO_CHAR(A.TAX_RECV_TIME,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS RECV_TIME /*회신일자*/ , A.AGENT_TEL_NUM AS AGENT_TEL_NUM /*법정대리인 연락처*/ FROM MSP_TAX_SMS_SEND_LIST A WHERE TAX_NO = #{taxNo} ORDER BY CONTRACT_NUM DESC

/* taxMgmtMapper.insertTaxSmsTmp */ INSERT INTO MSP_TAX_SMS_LIST( TAX_NO , SUBJECT , REQUEST_TIME , REGST_ID , REGST_TIME , TAX_TMP_ID , TAX_USG_YN , KAKAO_YN , ADDRESS_YN , AGENT_YN , AGENT_TMP_ID ) VALUES ( #{taxNo} /* 문자NO */ , #{subject} /* 제목 */ , #{requestTime} /* 예약전송일자 */ , #{regstId} /* 등록자 */ , SYSDATE /* 등록시간 */ , #{taxTmpId} /* 템플릿ID */ , 'R' /* 사용여부 (R : 진행대기, S : 완료, F : 실패, N : 삭제)*/ , #{kakaoYn} /* 카카오YN */ , #{addressYn} /* 주소YN */ , #{agentYn} /* 법정대리인 문자발송YN */ , #{agentTmpId} /* 법정대리인 템플릿ID */ )

/* taxMgmtMapper.insertTaxSmsSendTmp */ INSERT INTO MSP_TAX_SMS_SEND_LIST ( TAX_NO , CONTRACT_NUM , TEL_NO , USER_NM , USER_SSN , AGENT_TEL_NUM ) VALUES ( #{taxNo} /* 문자NO */ , #{contractNum} /* 계약번호 */ , (SELECT SUBSCRIBER_NO FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}) /* 수신번호 */ , (SELECT SUB_LINK_NAME FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}) /* 고객명 */ , (SELECT USER_SSN FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}) /* 주민등록번호 */ , (SELECT LGL_AGNT_NO FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}) /* 법정대리인 연락처 */ )
